_comment: Expected output of: python price_calc.py sample-intake.json profile.example.json. Committed so the computation is legible without running it. Hand-check: 4 signal points -> HIGH band -> 120 h, +25% AI buffer -> 150 h, x $125 = $18,750 labor, +10% overhead = $20,625.

pricing_model.reason: fired on scope_bounded=true, estimable, not ongoing
pricing_model.trap_avoided: avoids billing hourly on a clean bounded deliverable and capping your upside

rate_check: Rate is market-sane: base effort $15000 sits inside $5000-$15000. The quote ($20625) adds the risk buffer and overhead on top of this base.
